name: Samosa (2 pcs)
description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas, served with sweet and tangy tamarind chutney.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Cubes of paneer marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled to perfection in a tandoor with onions and bell peppers.

name: Chicken Tikka
description: Succulent pieces of chicken marinated in a spicy yogurt mixture and roasted until smoky and tender.

name: Hara Bhara Kabab
description: Healthy and delicious spinach and green pea patties, lightly spiced and shallow-fried.

name: Gobi Manchurian
description: Crispy cauliflower florets tossed in a spicy, sweet, and tangy Indo-Chinese sauce.

name: Chicken Lollipop
description: Deep-fried chicken drumsticks coated in a spicy red batter, served with spicy Schezwan sauce.

name: Aloo Tikki Chaat
description: Golden fried potato patties topped with yogurt, chutneys, chopped onions, and sev.

name: Fish Fry
description: Crispy batter-fried fish fillets seasoned with Indian spices and lemon juice.

name: Spring Rolls
description: Crispy rolls filled with sautéed vegetables, served with a sweet chili dipping sauce.

name: Onion Bhaji
description: Crispy sliced onion fritters seasoned with carom seeds and spices, perfect for teatime.

name: Vada Pav
description: The iconic Mumbai burger - a spicy potato dumpling in a soft bun with garlic chutney.

name: Dahi Vada
description: Soft lentil dumplings soaked in creamy yogurt and topped with sweet and spicy chutneys.

name: Chili Chicken
description: A popular Indo-Chinese dish of crispy chicken wings tossed with green chilies and soy sauce.

name: Mushroom Tikka
description: Fresh button mushrooms marinated in tandoori spices and grilled with a smoky finish.

name: Egg Pakora
description: Boiled egg halves coated in a spiced gram flour batter and deep-fried till golden.

name: Crispy Corn
description: Sweet corn kernels fried until crunchy and tossed with onions, chilies, and lemon.

name: Veg Seekh Kabab
description: Skewered minced vegetable kababs infused with aromatic spices and grilled in a tandoor.

name: Achari Paneer Tikka
description: Paneer cubes marinated in a tangy pickling spice blend and yogurt, grilled for a sharp flavor.

name: Tandoori Chicken (Half)
description: Classic tandoor-roasted chicken marinated in ginger-garlic paste and yogurt-based spices.

name: Kathi Roll - Paneer
description: Spiced paneer filling wrapped in a soft paratha with onions and green chutney.

name: Kathi Roll - Chicken
description: Juicy chicken tikka pieces wrapped in a flaky paratha with sliced onions and lime.

name: Malai Broccoli
description: Tender broccoli florets marinated in a creamy cheese and cardamom mixture, lightly grilled.

name: Mutton Seekh Kabab
description: Minced mutton blended with secret spices and grilled on skewers for a melt-in-the-mouth experience.

name: Chicken Seekh Kabab
description: Skewered minced chicken prepared with fresh herbs and traditional Indian spices.

name: Corn Cheese Balls
description: Golden-fried balls filled with a cheesy corn mixture, served with mint mayo.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Soft paneer cubes cooked in a rich, creamy, and mildly sweet tomato-based gravy.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Whole black lentils and kidney beans slow-cooked overnight with cream and butter.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Spicy chickpea curry served with large, fluffy deep-fried leavened bread.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Cottage cheese cubes in a smooth, thick, and nutritious spinach puree flavored with garlic.

name: Kadai Paneer
description: Paneer cooked with bell peppers, onions, and freshly ground kadai masala in a thick gravy.

name: Mix Veg Curry
description: A healthy medley of seasonal vegetables sautéed with aromatic spices in a tomato-onion base.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Deep-fried potato and paneer balls in a silky white gravy made from cashew and cream.
